title: Amazon says restoring damaged Middle East cloud operations to take months
summary: Amazon Web Services anticipates several months to restore cloud operations in Bahrain and the UAE following Iranian drone strikes in early March. The attacks disrupted services, prompting AWS to advise customers to migrate resources and restore from backups.

The tech giant expects its chip revenue to reach approximately $12 billion this year, a substantial rise from previous figures.
